name: Pink Globe Flower Stem - Threshold™
description:
Add a splash of beauty to your indoor space with this Artificial Globe Flower Stem from Threshold™. This 28-inch stem features pink globe flowers and lush green leaves on multiple branches for a lovely look that blends well with a variety of decor. Display it alone or pair with other artificial stems to create a stunning, natural-looking arrangement anywhere in your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
